chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 93 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.430/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 31.01.2024 M/s Khadim Hussain Malik and Zaheer Ahmed Ujjan, Advocates for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Noor Muhammad Indhar, Deputy District Education Officer (ES&HS), Ghotki..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner applied for the post of a Junior School Teacher (JST) (BPS-14) from Union Council Kandlo, Taluka Khangarh, District Ghotki. He obtained 40 marks and was denied appointment. His case is that instead of JSTs, Primary School Teachers were appointed in UC Kandlo, and he has been discriminated in that the persons who obtained less marks have been appointed as PST. Learned AAG and DDEO, present, submit that in Taluka Khangarh, District Ghotki, the last candidate appointed as JST had obtained more than 50 marks. The petitioner was at Serial No.198 on the merit list. He had not applied for the post of PST, hence, was not considered. In view of such factual position, no case on merit in favour of the petitioner for appoints as JST has been made out. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
